data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the capacity-hold primitive.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of the required capacity-hold primitive that reserves scarce capacity before final assignment. While the linked use case outlines the need for this primitive, it lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality. Therefore, the validation step cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of capacity-hold primitive implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the capacity-hold primitive requirement.
